hypothesis: If o4-mini is given a single complex in-context example for PROV-DM synthesis graph extraction from materials papers, then its collection rate and structural/parametric precision, recall, and F1 will exceed those of zero-shot prompting, simpler one-shot prompts, and GPT-4.1/GPT-4.1 mini, because the complex exemplar grounds the model in the required schema and attribute patterns.
